description_long: This bungalow is a low, single-story structure with a broad, polygonal footprint and a gently sloped, flat roof. The exterior is uniformly colored in a muted olive green, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The roof appears to be continuous and unbroken, with no visible overhangs, chimneys, or architectural ornamentation. There are no discernible windows, doors, or porch features visible from any angle, suggesting a highly simplified or conceptual design. The overall form is geometric and symmetrical, with straight, clean edges and a low profile. Its design suggests a contemporary architectural style, prioritizing simplicity and function over decorative elements.
description: A low, single-story olive green bungalow with a flat, polygonal roof and minimalist, unadorned exterior. The structure is geometric and modern, lacking visible windows, doors, or porches.
description_view_0: From this view, the bungalow appears as a flat, olive green polygon with no visible architectural details.
description_view_1: This angle shows the same flat, polygonal roof, maintaining the uniform olive green color and lack of features.
description_view_2: The bungalow remains featureless and flat, with the polygonal shape and muted color consistent across this view.
description_view_3: From this perspective, the structure continues to display a flat, polygonal form with no visible openings or architectural elements.
